mapper.insert: insert into kh_disease_symptom_items (disease_id, symptom_index, disease_name, language, symptom, relationship, create_time, update_time) values (#{diseaseId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{symptomIndex,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{diseaseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{language,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{symptom,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{relationship,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.select: select disease_id, symptom_index, disease_name, language, symptom, relationship, create_time, update_time from kh_disease_symptom_items
